original_final_question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest total CTA 'L' station entries? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text: 1. Sum CTA 'L' station entries by year from 2005 to 2010 and select the minimum.
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Sum monthtotal by year (2005-2010) and select the minimum; the lowest year is 2005.
